arts.sum: Leeds have won the FA Cup once - in 1972

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer window predicted including Newcastle United deal and shock £21m departure
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community Boffins at OLBG have simulated United's transfer window in Football Manager 2024.

arts.ttl: Leeds United man has six months to save ER career with looming transfer agreement
arts.sum: Leeds United are looking to sanction the loan exit of Joe Gelhardt to Hull City this week, with the striker hoping he can finally showcase his talents on a consistent basis at Championship level. The first notable piece of business for Leeds to attend to comes in the form of Joe Gelhardt leaving the club to move out on loan, with Hull City the side leading the race .

arts.ttl: Louie Barry sent clear transfer message as Leeds United await final January decision
arts.sum: Louie Barry's future is likely to be decided in the next few weeks with a move to the EFL Championship reckoned to be on the horizon - with Leeds United among the clubs being linked with his signature. "Louie Barry needs to join a team which plays a possession-based game and a similar style to Stockport County," the EFL expert told Plejmo.com .

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke simply cannot name this Leeds United player in starting XI today
arts.sum: Leeds United have one very notable selection decision to make for this evening’s clash against Harrogate Town, and it’s whether Daniel Farke will drop Illan Meslier . Leeds should be coming into this FA Cup weekend knowing that they’ve left a healthy three-point cushion at the top of the Championship, but alas, the Whites could only secure a draw at Hull City last time out.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leeds vs Harrogate - TV channel, BBC iPlayer live stream
arts.sum: With the BBC broadcasting the clash between Leeds and Harrogate, the match is also available to live stream. How to live-stream Leeds United vs Harrogate Town

arts.ttl: Leeds United must have realistic 9-goal alternative lined up if Boro agreement fails
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be eyeing an ambitious move to sign Emmanuel Latte Lath from Middlesbrough this month, but they have to be considering a more realistic backup plan meanwhile. His striker contingent is doing reasonably well with 13 goals and eight assists between them, the majority coming from Joel Piroe, but there is still a craving for another option to help fire Leeds back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds player and Harrogate Town boss Neil Aspin makes loyalties clear for FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Having made his debut for Leeds aged just 16 in 1982, Neil Aspin racked up more than 200 games - but also had a big influence on their FA Cup opponents who they meet in an historic clash

arts.ttl: One Leeds United outfielder simply has to start today, even if he’s barely featured all season
arts.sum: Leeds United welcome Harrogate Town to Elland Road this evening, and it’s surely a perfect opportunity for Isaac Schmidt to finally get a start. Leeds have bigger fish to fry than an FA Cup run in 2025, but their home meeting with Harrogate Town gives Daniel Farke a good chance to take inventory with his squad.

arts.ttl: Leeds in pole position to sign Tottenham hero in bargain deal
arts.sum: Although Tottenham have ongoing defensive struggles, there’s every chance that Ben Davies could be snapped up by Leeds in the transfer window. Daniel Farke had hinted that Leeds would make signings this month, and with Ange Postecoglou’s Tottenham future uncertain, it could be the right time for Davies to look for pastures new.
